item.title: This Easy Outdoor Habit May Be The Secret To Feeling Less Lonely
item.description: New research suggests that solo time outdoors, not socializing, may be the key to easing loneliness.

item.title: Cravings, Fatigue, & Mood Swings? Here's What To Eat Each Phase Of Your Cycle
item.description: And permission to eat the carbs (and the chocolate!)

item.title: Is This The Part Of Endometriosis Treatment We’ve Been Missing?
item.description: Research reveals how endometriosis changes the brain.

item.title: In Need Of Sun, Rest & Relaxation? (Who Isn't?) Try This Hotspot
item.description: Welcome to Playa del Carmen, Mexico's premier resort destination, located in the heart of the Riviera Maya.

item.title: How Women Can Prevent Injury While Weightlifting In Their 40s & Beyond
item.description: Because certain fractures become much more common in perimenopause.
